description_long: This is a tall, slender vase with a flared rim and a gently tapering body, finished in a matte black color. Two broad, horizontal gold bands encircle the upper and lower sections of the vase, adding a touch of elegance and visual contrast. The surface appears smooth and hard, likely made from ceramic or painted metal, with no visible handles or additional adornments. The vase's proportions suggest it is designed for decorative purposes, suitable for holding flowers or as a standalone accent piece. Its minimalist design and bold color scheme make it well-suited for modern urban environments such as plazas, lobbies, or public gardens. The interior is likely hollow, allowing it to function as a receptacle.
description: A tall, matte black vase with two wide gold bands and a flared rim, featuring a smooth, hard surface and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full height, flared rim, and both gold bands clearly against the black body.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, with the same gold bands and flared rim visible.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, maintaining the same visual features as previous views with no additional details.
description_view_3: Final view mirrors the others, showing the consistent gold banding and vase shape.
